widgets_values: Each video input is a different pass of the same basic video.
You can decide how many reference pictures you want to add, also which Ipadapter you want to connect

Prompt based on the timeline you have. 
Think of the numbers as keyframes.

Change your max_frames based on how many frames you have in the inputs.
Test out different combinations as you like.
